title: carex stenophylla subsp. stenophylloides
intro: Carex stenophylla subsp. stenophylloides, also known as the narrow-leaved sedge or stenophylla sedge, is a subspecies of sedge plant that belongs to the genus Carex. This plant is native to North America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The narrow-leaved sedge has been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and expectorant properties. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in poultices and salves to aid in wound healing and skin rejuvenation.
